PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITYSCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT GROUP ATTN R SIMMS
POS STATES SRVD DEFT'S CLAIM,BUT NO DEFT'S CLAIM FILED;POS TAKEN FROM TRAY,526PM,12/18.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, RAMONA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STONERIDGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION CITYSCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT GROUP ATTN R SIMMS REYNOLDS, RHODA,   PRESIDENT $181.75 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $201.75, RHODA REYNOLDS, MARISSA PEREA, RAMUNDA CRAFT, PAUL ESPINOSA AND EMMA BARON ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED.
